task_snapshots.title: 341-04: SWE-Bench results analysis & publication narrative
task_snapshots.description: Analyze SWE-Bench evaluation results and produce publishable narrative [subtask of 07a7114366e9]. Compare resolve rates, wall-clock time, and costs across all 4 scenarios (solo-sonnet, solo-opus, bernstein-sonnet, bernstein-mixed). Compute delta narratives: cost per issue, resolve rate advantage, speed improvement. Create blog post / research narrative demonstrating that Bernstein + Sonnet achieves better or comparable results to solo Opus at lower cost. Complete when: analysis document exists with key metrics, deltas computed, and narrative ready for publication.
